events.event_text: From 0.0s to 0.7s, there is a car passing by on the road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A man wearing a hat and a man without a hat were walking on the sidewalk.
events.event_text: From 5.1s to 7.2s, a man wearing a hat and a man without a hat were walking on the sidewalk.

events.appearance_notes: Low activity; When the two people walked to the gray car parked on the roadside, the man wearing the hat kicked the car a few times, and the man without the hat turned to look at him as he walked.
events.event_text: From 7.2s to 12.2s, when the two people walked to the gray car parked on the roadside, the man wearing the hat kicked the car a few times, and the man without the hat turned to look at him as he walked.
